tasks.description: Unit tests for services/orchestrator.ts — Orchestrator class: normalizeAgentName, processTaskResult, validateTaskQuality, validateTask, rejection cascade prevention, resetAgentState
tasks.context:
backend/src/services/orchestrator.ts exports Orchestrator class extending EventEmitter.

CREATE: backend/src/services/__tests__/orchestrator.test.ts (max 200 lines)

Mock: pass mock redis object to constructor. jest.mock('../utils/logger') optional but simplify output.

Key tests:
1. normalizeAgentName — kebab to camelCase
2. normalizeAgentName — camelCase to kebab
3. normalizeAgentName — single word unchanged
4. processTaskResult — emits 'taskResult' event for 'completed' status
5. processTaskResult — emits 'taskResult' event for 'rejected' status
6. processTaskResult — first rejection increments failure count to 1, agent not paused
7. processTaskResult — second rejection triggers pause, emits 'agentPaused'
8. processTaskResult — success after failures resets consecutiveFailures to 0
9. validateTaskQuality — null content → passed: false
10. validateTaskQuality — valid content, active agent → passed: true
11. validateTaskQuality — paused agent → passed: false with pause message
12. validateTask — missing agentName → returns false
13. validateTask — redis.exists returns 1 → returns true
14. validateTask — redis.exists returns 0 → returns false
15. getAgentRejectionState — returns undefined for unknown agent
16. resetAgentState — removes agent state

Min: 14 tests.
